chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Jail Appeal No. D – 55 of 2021 Conf. Case No. D – 09 of 2021 Cr. Acq. Appeal No. D – 34 of 2021 Cr. Jail Appeal No. S – 72 of 2021 Cr. Jail Appeal No. S – 73 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 21-02-2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for appellants in Cr. Jail Appeals No. D-55 of 2021, S-72 and S-73 of 2023 and for respondent No.1 in connected acquittal appeal. Mr. Abdul Jabbar Sial, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Evidence of eyewitnesses has been read. Learned counsel for appellants seeks time for arguments. Adjourned to 14.03.2024 to be taken up at 11:00 a.m. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad

Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-916 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on CMA 4863/23 3.For hearing of CMA 4985/18 4.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for petitioner and requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is unwell. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1852 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 8168/19 3.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for petitioner and requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is unwell. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-910 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 3895/23 3.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Mr. Shewak Ram Valeecha, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned AAG has filed statement on behalf of respondent No.4; a copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for petitioners. Mr. Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for respondents No. 5 to 15 and requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is unwell. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1623 of 2023 Const. Petition No.D-1652 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 7020/23 3.For hearing of CMA 6940/23 4.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner in C.P.No.D-1623/23 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner in connected petition. Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate for intervener in C.P.No.D-1623/23 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for resp: No.8 in C.P.No.D-1652/23 Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Assistant Director (LAW), ECP. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ D.A.G. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for petitioner in both matters seek time, as their senior counsel are not in attendance. As a last chance, matters are adjourned to 13.03.2024. Interim order, if any, passed earlier to continue till the next date of hearing. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1687 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 7248/23 3.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for respondents No.10 to 13. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G a/w Arbab Ali, Director, Fisheries Sukkur and Muhammad Azam Memon, SHO, P.S, Khadehri. ***** Learned AAG has filed comments on behalf of respondent No.8, whereas, learned counsel for private respondents has filed statement; copies whereof are exchanged. SHO, P.S, Khadehri is present and submits that he has written so many letters to Mukhtiarkar, Rohri to clarify position as to whether the depression used for fishing, which the petitioners claim to be situated in their land is actually situated in their land or is located in the government land, but he is not responding. Mukhtiarkar, Rohri is directed to communicate relevant report to SHO, P.S, Khadehri without fail for submitting before the Court. Adjourned to 27.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 27.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1690 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 7286/23 3.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Farhatullah Yaseen Kalwar, Advocate for respondent No.11. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.7 to 10 and seeks time for preparation. Learned counsel for respondent No.11 has filed objections; a copy whereof is supplied to other side. Adjourned to 27.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 27.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-261 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For hearing of main case. 2.For orders on CMA 5940/2022 3.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioner. On the last date of hearing, counsel for petitioner sought time for preparation and at his request, case was adjourned to today. However, today, he is called absent without any intimation. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1844 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Abdul Jabbar Sial, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ubedullah K. Ghoto, counsel for petitioner and requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is busy at Islamabad. Adjourned to 27.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 27.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st Civil Appeal No.D-26 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 None present for the appellant. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the appellant. The case diaries shows that earlier also when none was present on behalf of appellant, this appeal was dismissed vide order dated 07.09.2021, but on the request of learned counsel for appellant and with consent, this appeal was restored to its original position vide order dated 18.10.2023, but thereafter on 30.11.2023, no one was present on behalf of appellant and today also none has appeared and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this 1st Civil Appeal is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Accordingly, this 1st Civil Appeal is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-419 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 7399/2019 3.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 M/s Abdul Qadir Shaikh and Abdul Basir Shaikh, Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, counsel for intervenors and requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is unwell. Adjourned to 26.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 26.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st C.A.No.D-17 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of CMA 514/2020 20-02-2024 Mir Ali Raza, AM, HBFC and Asma Faheem Khan, Attorney, HBFC are in attendance. ***** Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Hamayoun Shaikh, counsel for appellant and requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is out of station. Adjourned to 26.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 26.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-741 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 21-02-2024 M/s Abdul Raheem Mahar and Abdul Salam Shaikh, Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Zaheer Ahmed Memon, DAO, Khairpur and Muhammad Bachal Kanhar, AXEN on behalf of XEN, Irrigation East Division, Khairpur. ***** The District Accounts Officer, Khairpur is present and submits that corrigendum dated 16.02.2024 in respect of appointment of petitioner Zulfiqar Ali as Beldar in BPS-02 has been issued correcting the position of his appointment as Beldar in BPS-01, this corrigendum was required to be issued by the Chief Engineer, Irrigation Sukkur Barrage Left Bank Region, Sukkur and not by the Executive Engineer, Irrigation East Division, Khairpur. More so, the appointment of the petitioner has to be verified by the Secretary, Irrigation Department, Government of Sindh. Learned AAG seeks time to call report from the Chief Engineer, Irrigation Sukkur Barrage Left Bank Region, Sukkur and comments from the Secretary, Irrigation Department, Government of Sindh in this regard. Adjourned to 27.03.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
